name: skc-vs-tools
description: Business Central AL dev setup: presets, MCP servers, extensions, XLF translation, and LM Bridge to expose VS Code Language Model tools to Cursor.
_comment: Note: Extension visibility (public/private) is managed via VS Code Marketplace web UI. Extensions are private by default. To change visibility, visit: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/manage/publishers/SKConsultingSA/extensions/skc-vs-tools/hub

viewsWelcome.contents:
No translation files found.

Make sure your workspace has a **Translations** folder with **.g.xlf** files.

[Refresh](command:skc.refreshTranslations)

languageModelTools.name: skc_translate_xlf
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Translates a Business Central XLF source file (*.g.xlf) to a target language using the configured Azure Translation Function. Use when the user wants to translate an XLF file to a specific locale (e.g. fr-FR, de-DE). Requires skc.azureFunctionUrl to be set. Returns a summary of translated count and sync info (added/removed units).
languageModelTools.userDescription: Translate an XLF file to a target language via Azure.

sourceFilePath.description: Absolute path to the source XLF file (e.g. .../Translations/MyApp.g.xlf).

targetLanguage.description: Target language code (e.g. fr-FR, de-DE, es-ES).

languageModelTools.name: skc_list_translation_files
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists all XLF translation files in the workspace and their translation status. For each source file (*.g.xlf) in a Translations folder, shows total units and for each target language file shows translated count and percentage. Use when the user asks about translation progress, which files need translation, or status of XLF files.
languageModelTools.userDescription: List XLF files and translation progress.

workspacePath.description: Optional. Absolute path to a workspace folder to limit the listing. If omitted, all workspace folders are listed.

skc.skipInstalledExtensions.description: Skip reinstalling extensions that are already present.

skc.uninstallExtensionsRemovedFromPreset.description: When applying presets, uninstall any installed extension that is not in the preset list. The preset list is the only allowed set; all other extensions (except SKC VS Tools) are removed.

skc.presetFilePath.description: Optional path to a JSON preset file. If set, the file is read on activation/command to overlay settings and extensions. Relative paths resolve from the first workspace folder.

skc.mcpFilePath.description: Optional path to a JSON file that defines only MCP servers. If set, it replaces the built-in mcp.servers. Relative paths resolve from the first workspace folder. Special value: 'cursor-global' resolves to the global Cursor MCP file (~/.cursor/mcp.json).

skc.removeMcpsNotInPreset.description: When applying presets, set mcp.servers to exactly the preset list (any MCP server not in the preset is removed). If false, preset servers are merged with existing ones (existing servers not in the preset are kept).

skc.writeCursorMcpFile.description: When applying presets, also write MCP servers to the Cursor user path (e.g. %USERPROFILE%\.cursor\mcp.json on Windows, ~/.cursor/mcp.json elsewhere). Disable if you manage that file yourself.

skc.writeVSCodeMcpFile.description: When applying presets, write MCP servers directly to the VS Code user mcp.json file (e.g. %APPDATA%\Code - Insiders\User\mcp.json). This uses the VS Code object format (server name as key, no id field) and migrates any old numeric-key entries created by previous versions. Disable if you manage that file yourself.

skc.extensionsFilePath.description: Optional path to a JSON file that defines additional extensions to install. Unioned with the built-in list. Relative paths resolve from the first workspace folder.

skc.installSkillsOnApplyPresets.description: Automatically install Cursor skills when applying presets.

skc.overwriteExistingSkills.description: Overwrite existing Cursor skills when installing. If false, existing skills are skipped to preserve user modifications.

skc.showNewsOnStartup.description: Show news notification on VS Code startup, especially when a new version is detected.

skc.autoOpenNewsPage.description: Automatically open the news page in full view on startup instead of showing a notification. Requires 'showNewsOnStartup' to be enabled.

skc.newsFilePath.description: Path to a markdown file containing news/updates. Shown on startup when enabled. Relative paths resolve from the extension folder or workspace.

skc.azureFunctionUrl.description: URL of the Azure Translation Function endpoint (e.g., https://your-function.azurewebsites.net/api/github-webhook?mode=direct).

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run sync:extensions && npm run build
scripts.package: npm run sync:extensions && npm run build && vsce package
scripts.publish:patch: npm run compile && node scripts/publish.js patch
scripts.publish:minor: npm run compile && node scripts/publish.js minor
scripts.publish:major: npm run compile && node scripts/publish.js major
